# fivenines_integrations (Data Source)

Lists all FiveNines integrations (notification channels) for the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fivenines_integrations" "all" {}

output "slack_integrations" {
  value = [
    for i in data.fivenines_integrations.all.integrations :
    i if i.provider == "slack"
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `integrations` (Attributes List) List of integrations. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--integrations))

<a id="nestedatt--integrations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `integrations`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the integration is enabled.
- `id` (Number) Integration ID.
- `name` (String) Integration name.
- `provider` (String) Provider (email, slack, discord, etc.).
- `type` (String) Integration type.
- `verified` (Boolean) Whether the integration is verified.
